title: Celestia SMP Season 2
description: Celestia SMP Season 2, this pack is intended for use by people joining Celestia SMP.
body:
This modpack was made for season 2 of Celestia SMP.


[Celestia SMP](https://celestiasmp.com/discord) is run by two _idiot_ who have no idea how to properly make modpacks and therefore this pack may or may not be optimized or balanced very well.

Features:

- Origins (as usual)
- More (and cooler) structures
- shaders included (Complementary, even)
- Create (with addons)
- Painting
- Magic mods
- Tech mods
- Xaero's map
- New world generation (with Tectonic)
- Overhauled enchanting
- Much more


## Spec suggestions
- 6GB of allocated RAM
- or 4GB without shaders
- should be able to run on any modern CPU, i think
